intent: Install one mission-scoped read-only audit payload inside the Engineering mission workspace, execute it only as an approved validation, and produce evidence without changing FOXAI source, launchers, runtimes, models, databases, archives, personal files, or existing receipts.
rollback_boundary: If any validation fails, Workshop restores the targeted mission-scoped audit payload. Any partial evidence remains confined to the mission evidence workspace and must not be treated as a successful audit receipt.
title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-0 — Read-Only Live Baseline and Reuse Audit

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008_V1A0_AUDIT.py')
actual=hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
expected='7e9aa587967be8a6969e293c636e148b4df61724c71d291f181b9e7eecbc916e'
assert actual==expected, f'audit payload hash mismatch: {actual}'
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A0_AUDIT_PAYLOAD_HASH_OK')
validations.name: Verify exact mission-scoped audit payload SHA-256

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008_V1A0_AUDIT.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(source,str(p),'exec')
tree=ast.parse(source)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split('.')[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden_imports={'socket','urllib','http','ftplib','requests','pip','ensurepip'}
bad=sorted(imports & forbidden_imports)
assert not bad, 'forbidden network/package imports: '+', '.join(bad)
for forbidden in ('shell=True','os.remove(','shutil.rmtree(','Path.unlink(','requests.','urlopen(','pip install','subprocess.Popen('):
    assert forbidden not in source, 'forbidden audit operation marker: '+forbidden
assert 'shell=False' in source
assert 'network_used": False' in source
assert 'source_or_launchers_executed": False' in source
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A0_STATIC_SAFETY_OK')
validations.name: Verify audit syntax and static no-network no-package safety boundary

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, json
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1A0\REPOSITORY_REFERENCE.json')
assert p.is_file(), f'missing repository reference: {p}'
actual=hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
expected='b5c5df89c6f65a74d6d17e4329e3b791b148a3cf8f69205835a125a00f8c3cb0'
assert actual==expected, f'repository reference hash mismatch: {actual}'
data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert data.get('schema')=='foxai.agent_fox.repository_reference.v1'
assert data.get('network_required_on_foxai') is False
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A0_REPOSITORY_REFERENCE_OK')
validations.name: Verify bundled repository reference provenance file
Run bounded Agent Fox V1A-0 read-only live baseline audit

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI')
out=root/Path(r'System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008_V1A0_AUDIT')
required=(
 'LIVE_MANIFEST.json',
 'LAUNCHER_MAP.json',
 'PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP.json',
 'REUSABLE_COMPONENTS.json',
 'MODEL_AND_ROUTING_INVENTORY.json',
 'STORAGE_CLASSIFICATION.json',
 'TOOL_INVENTORY.json',
 'MISSION_EVIDENCE_INDEX.json',
 'COLLECTOR_WARNINGS.json',
 'SUMMARY.md',
 'AUDIT_RECEIPT.json',
)
missing=[name for name in required if not (out/name).is_file()]
assert not missing, 'missing audit outputs: '+', '.join(missing)
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total <= 134217728, f'output ceiling exceeded: {total}'
receipt=json.loads((out/'AUDIT_RECEIPT.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert receipt.get('mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008'
assert receipt.get('result')=='read_only_audit_complete'
assert receipt.get('network_used') is False
assert receipt.get('live_system_modified') is False
assert receipt.get('mission_workspace_written') is True
assert receipt.get('packages_installed') is False
assert receipt.get('source_or_launchers_executed') is False
assert receipt.get('protected_files_unchanged') is True
manifest=json.loads((out/'LIVE_MANIFEST.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert manifest.get('mission_id')=='ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008'
safety=manifest.get('safety') or {}
for key in ('network_used','packages_installed','elevation_requested','foxai_source_executed','launchers_executed','services_started_or_stopped','files_deleted','files_renamed'):
    assert safety.get(key) is False, f'unsafe or missing safety flag: {key}={safety.get(key)}'
runtime=json.loads((out/'PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert runtime.get('runtime_count',0) >= 1, 'no Python interpreter was successfully inventoried'
assert runtime.get('foxai_source_executed') is False
launchers=json.loads((out/'LAUNCHER_MAP.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert launchers.get('execution_performed') is False
missions=json.loads((out/'MISSION_EVIDENCE_INDEX.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert missions.get('original_receipts_modified') is False
assert missions.get('similarity_is_not_proof') is True
print('AGENT_FOX_V1A0_READ_ONLY_AUDIT_OUTPUT_OK')
validations.name: Verify complete evidence set, safety declarations, protected hashes, and 128 MiB ceiling
